query:
SELECT 
  SUBSTRING(drawTime, 12, 5) as time,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  MIN(drawNumber) as first_draw,
  MAX(drawNumber) as last_draw
FROM draw_records
WHERE drawTime LIKE '115/03/15 20:%' OR drawTime LIKE '115/03/15 21:%'
GROUP BY time
ORDER BY time;
